title: Unified Playwright Test Suite
description: Comprehensive UI validation suite covering 6 groups across all viewport presets

createdFiles.description: Main test suite covering all 6 groups: FAB visibility, Safe-area correctness, Hydration stability, Greeting positioning, Firebase runtime, WebView device behavior
CI-ready Playwright configuration with optimized settings for consistent test runs
Main entry script to run the full UI test suite with proper error handling and result reporting
Auto-fix patches for common issues detected by the test suite
Documentation explaining how to use the unified test suite

updatedFiles.description: Added npm script 'test:full-ui' to run the unified test suite

testGroups.name: FAB Visibility
testGroups.description: Validates Floating Action Button visibility and positioning across all viewports

testGroups.name: Safe-area Correctness
testGroups.description: Ensures safe-area initialization and values are correct

testGroups.name: Greeting Positioning
testGroups.description: Validates proper positioning of greeting elements below TopBar

features: Generates screenshots and logs for each test
Produces structured JSON output for analysis
Provides auto-fix patches if issues are detected
